drift: Gallery uses disabled:opacity-30, quantity uses disabled:opacity-40
likelyCause: No shared disabled opacity token in xa-b theme
fixDirection: Standardize to disabled:opacity-50 across all xa-b interactive controls

drift: border-1/border-2 opacity tokens used for both decorative and functional control boundaries without distinction
likelyCause: Single border token scale designed for minimal aesthetic, no functional-control variant
fixDirection: Introduce --border-control semantic token at 0 0% 55% for interactive element boundaries
